payload.title: Derive done/terminal semantics from column kind
payload.description: Replace literal === 'done' / OPEN_STATUSES logic with column-kind lookups: epic progress counts (src/repo.js ~794), confetti on drop-to-done, 'epic still has open work' detection, and the drive-by 'done = closed' rule (src/web/app.js ~2446/2482). A column's kind (done/cancelled = terminal) drives all of it.
